SR_SPLMTL_EMPLYMT_1_CD 
LABEL: 
Supplemental HRSN Employment 1: Want Help Finding or Keeping Job 
DESCRIPTION: Screening result (SR) Supplemental health related social need (HRSN) employment where patient 
wants help finding or keeping a job. 
LONG NAME: SR_SPLMTL_EMPLYMT_1_CD 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
1 
SOURCE: 
AHC data system 
VALUES: 
0 = I do not need or want help 
1 = Yes,
